suggestions.label: Worked example
suggestions.text: Can you show me a worked example of mathematical induction?

suggestions.label: Test me
suggestions.text: Give me a practice question on inverse trigonometric functions.

suggestions.label: Explain
suggestions.text: Explain parametric equations and how to convert between forms.

suggestions.label: Binomial theorem
suggestions.text: Help me understand the binomial theorem for (1+x)^n.

suggestions.label: Vectors
suggestions.text: Explain how to find the angle between two vectors.

suggestions.label: Permutations
suggestions.text: Show me how to solve circular permutation problems.

suggestions.label: Past paper
suggestions.text: Give me an HSC Extension 1 style question on projectile motion.

suggestions.label: Check my answer
suggestions.text: Check my working: [paste your answer here]

suggestions.label: What to study
suggestions.text: Based on my progress, what should I focus on today?

quickActions.label: Past paper
quickActions.text: Give me an HSC past paper question.
